description_long: This object consists of two adjacent grave markers set on a rectangular patch of grass. The left marker is a tall, ornate headstone with a pointed top and decorative relief, featuring a recessed niche and a red floral motif. The right marker is a taller, more slender monument topped with a sculpted angel figure, wings folded and hands resting in front, standing on a plinth. Both markers are made of weathered stone, showing signs of age and exposure, with moss and discoloration at the base. The angel monument has a rectangular plaque area on its front, likely for inscriptions, while the headstone has a more elaborate, Gothic-style design. The ground beneath is uneven, with patches of grass and earth visible around the bases.
description: A pair of weathered stone grave markers, one with a sculpted angel and the other with ornate Gothic detailing, set on a grassy patch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profiles of both grave markers, with the angel statue's silhouette prominent.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the angel statue and the simpler, flat back of the adjacent headstone.
description_view_2: Side view from the opposite direction, highlighting the thickness and base details of both markers.
description_view_3: Frontal view showing the angel statue's face and plaque, and the ornate headstone with its decorative niche and red motif.
